zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Davenport於1501年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿德林頓時，她的父親John Davenport Esq.21歲，母親Matilda Maria Brereton20歲。她於1519年與Sir Thomas De Rode在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿德林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1573年在英國越可爾希霍爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Davenport于1501年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲John Davenport Esq.21岁，母亲Matilda Maria Brereton20岁。她于1519年与Sir Thomas De Rode在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿德林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1573年在英国越可爾希霍爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Davenport was born in 1501, in Adlington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Davenport Esq., was 21 and her mother, Matilda Maria Brereton, was 20. She married Sir Thomas De Rode in 1519, in Adlington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1573, in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Davenport est née en 1501, à Adlington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Davenport Esq., avait 21 ans et sa mère, Matilda Maria Brereton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas De Rode en 1519, à Adlington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1573, à Hipperholme, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Davenport 1501 in Adlington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Davenport Esq. 21 und ihre Mutter Matilda Maria Brereton 20. Sie hat 1519 in Adlington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas De Rode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1573 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Davenport è nata il nel 1501 nel Adlington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Davenport Esq., aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Matilda Maria Brereton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas De Rode nel 1519, nel Adlington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1573, nel Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Davenportが1501年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父John Davenport Esq.は21歳，母Matilda Maria Breretonは20歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアドリントンでSir Thomas De Rodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1573年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒップエロールメで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Davenport(이)가 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Davenport Esq.(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Maria Brereton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애들링턴에서 Sir Thomas De Rode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 영국 요르크실르 히p홀에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Davenport nasceu em 1501, em Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Davenport Esq., tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Maria Brereton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas De Rode em 1519, em Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1573, em Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Davenport родилась в 1501 г. в местности адлингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Davenport Esq. было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda Maria Brereton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas De Rode в 1519 г. в местности адлингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1573 г. в местности хиппиролм, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Davenport nació en 1501, en Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Davenport Esq., tenía 21 años y su mamá, Matilda Maria Brereton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas De Rode en 1519, en Adlington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1573, en Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
